name: Honey Oatmeal Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup water (I used water from soaking wheat berries!)
2 cups flour (I used fresh ground whole wheat - yum!)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup water, 1/4 cup honey, 1 tablespoon salt, and 1/2 cup oats in a bowl.
2. Add the flour and yeast to the mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. In my Breadman automatic bread machine, process the dough according to the manufacturer's instructions.
4. Be sure not to add any extra flour at this stage, as the mixture is extremely wet until the oats have absorbed the moisture.
5. After about 1 minute of kneading, the mixture will form a nice smooth ball.
